summary: Tested Emergent-style Autonomous Agent platform. Backend APIs: 19/20 tests passed (95%). Items endpoint returning data (bug fix verified). Frontend UI: Autonomous tab functional with prompt input, execution history, and plan visualization.

minor.issue: Returns 520 error with auto-healed message. Multi-agent collaboration endpoint has internal error but system auto-recovered.

features_tested.details: Returns 5 seeded items for superadmin tenant - bug fix verified
Creates execution plans from natural language prompts via GPT-5.2 LLM. Returns plan with steps, risk level, reasoning, and status.
Executes plans with streaming results. Supports auto_confirm parameter.
Confirms pending steps that require user approval before execution.
Returns execution history with status filter support. Shows plans with their statuses.
Returns audit log of all agent actions with action_type filter support.
Accepts positive/negative feedback for AI learning. Returns confirmation message.
Returns learned patterns with min_confidence filter. AI improves from feedback.
Endpoint accessible but returns 520 internal error (auto-healed). Multi-agent collaboration needs review.

features_tested.feature: Autonomous Tab UI on AI Business Agent page
features_tested.details: Tab visible with: prompt textarea (data-testid=autonomous-prompt), Create Plan button (data-testid=autonomous-execute-btn), auto-confirm toggle, Recent Executions sidebar showing history with status badges, Quick Examples section.

action_items: Review /api/autonomous/collaborate endpoint - has internal error (auto-healed but needs fix)
AgentCollaborationHub.create_collaboration may have issue with agent registration or session storage
critical_code_review_comments: autonomous_agent_system.py: Well-structured with AutonomousAgentCore, StreamingResponseGenerator, AgentCollaborationHub classes
Plan creation uses GPT-5.2 for intelligent task breakdown with fallback to rule-based approach
Confirmation workflow properly enforces different levels (none, low, medium, high, critical) based on action type
Audit logging captures all agent actions with timestamps, user info, and results
Learning patterns stored in MongoDB with confidence scores and usage tracking
Frontend AIAgentPage.js properly implements all UI elements with correct data-testid attributes

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified and functional

seed_data_creation: 5 demo items already seeded for superadmin tenant (verified)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Autonomous Agent platform fully implemented. Key endpoints: /api/autonomous/plan (create plans), /api/autonomous/execute/{plan_id} (execute), /api/autonomous/history (view history), /api/autonomous/audit-log (audit trail), /api/autonomous/feedback/{plan_id} (learning feedback). Frontend has Autonomous tab on AI Business Agent page with data-testid attributes for testing. Collaboration endpoint (/api/autonomous/collaborate) has internal error - needs investigation.
rca_of_the_issue: The /api/autonomous/collaborate endpoint returns 520 error because AgentCollaborationHub may not have any agents registered. The create_collaboration method calls _determine_required_agents which returns agent types like 'business_intelligence', 'operations', etc., but these agents may not be registered in self.agents dictionary. The execute_collaboration then skips them. This is a minor issue as the core autonomous agent features (plan, execute, history) all work correctly.
